answer:
\boxed{E}  

The open-to-buy is calculated as: Planned end-of-month inventory ($15,000) plus planned sales ($6,000) plus planned markdowns ($500) minus present inventory ($12,000) minus inventory commitments ($3,000) minus actual sales ($3,000) minus actual markdowns ($200). This gives $15,000 + $6,000 + $500 - $12,000 - $3,000 - $3,000 - $200 = $3,300.
